TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Thyakan, title = Thyakan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thyakan} }

S.FORM: alang Thyakan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 113 buwan, 409 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 387 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Thyakan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Thyakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Thyakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Thyakan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Thyakan hya' ga Hbun-tunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Thyakan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 113 buwan, 409 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 387 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Thyakan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Thyakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Thyakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Thyakan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Thyakan hya' ga Hbun-tunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tħjakan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tħjakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tħjakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tħjakan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tħjakan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tħjakan ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-tunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
